justification: The diff comprehensively migrates dependencies (Spring 4->6, JUnit 4->5, Mockito 1->5, Jakarta EE namespaces) and updates deprecated APIs (BigDecimal.ROUND_* -> RoundingMode, HandlerInterceptorAdapter -> HandlerInterceptor, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 -> APPLICATION_JSON). It uses Java 21 idioms like @Serial and String.formatted(), and correctly adopts <release> in maven-compiler-plugin. However, it doesn't fully leverage Java 21 features like records or pattern matching, keeping the score at 4 instead of 5.
